Thor: The Dark World (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $206,362,140Details
International Box Office $438,240,376
Worldwide Box Office $644,602,516
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $44,638,370
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $49,457,898
Total $94,096,268
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Thor fights to restore order across the cosmos... but an ancient race led by the vengeful Malekith returns to plunge the universe back into darkness. To defeat an enemy that even Odin and Asgard cannot withstand, Thor sets upon his most dangerous and personal journey yet, forced into an alliance with the treacherous Loki to save not only his people and those he loves...but our universe itself.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$85,737,841 (41.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.41 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,841 opening theaters/3,841 max. theaters, 6.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $303,551,522

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 8th, 2013 (Wide) by Walt Disney
November 8th, 2013 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: October 30th, 2013 (Wide) (Indonesia)
October 30th, 2013 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 30th, 2013 (Wide) (Belgium)
October 30th, 2013 (Wide) (Sweden)
October 30th, 2013 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: February 25th, 2014 by Buena Vista Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of intense sci-fi action and violence, and some suggestive content.
(Rating bulletin 2295, 10/23/2013)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Franchise: Thor, Marvel Cinematic Universe
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos, Intertitle, Invented Language, Motion Capture Performance, Prologue, Scene in End Credits, Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion
Geographical setting: London
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Gods and Goddesses, Non-Chronological, Revenge, Sibling Rivalry, Surprise Twist, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Adopted Family, End of the World
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action

Production/Financing Companies: Marvel Studios, Kevin Feige
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Thor fights to restore order across the cosmos... but an ancient race led by the vengeful Malekith returns to plunge the universe back into darkness. To defeat an enemy that even Odin and Asgard cannot withstand, Thor sets upon his most dangerous and personal journey yet, forced into an alliance with the treacherous Loki to save not only his people and those he loves...but our universe itself.
